news.title: NGT bench forms panel to probe illegal sand mining in Balasore
news.para: The National Green Tribunal has formed a joint committee to investigate allegations of illegal sand mining on the Subarnarekha river in Odisha's Balasore district. The committee, comprising representatives from district administration, SEIAA, and OSPCB, will submit a report within four weeks. This action follows a petition by local residents concerned about environmental degradation and revenue loss.

news.title: Government adopts category-based land valuation in Taleigao
news.para: Goa's revenue department has replaced its uniform land valuation system with a category-based approach, piloting the change in Taleigao. This new methodology assigns different minimum land rates to plots within a village based on location and amenities, aiming to address inconsistencies and revenue loss from the previous uniform rate system.

news.title: Telangana government secures ₹13,600 crore refinancing from IRFC for Hyderabad Metro Rail
news.para: Hyderabad Metro Rail has secured a significant financial boost with a Rs 13,600 crore refinancing agreement from IRFC. This deal aims to alleviate the project's debt burden and support future expansion, reinforcing the state government's commitment to enhancing public transport in the rapidly growing city. The loan will be repaid over 20 years.

news.title: Over 40 housing societies in Ghaziabad fail fire safety test
news.para: Ghaziabad building owners exceeding 15 meters in height or 500 sqm floor area without a fire NOC will now bear firefighting costs. Notices issued to 43 societies for lacking or non-functional safety equipment follow a recent fire. Officials found widespread violations, including blocked access, prompting a crackdown on non-compliance.

news.title: Gurugram: Malibu Towne Country Club gets OC after years, reopening likely
news.para: Malibu Towne's country club has finally received its occupation certificate after a two-year wait, paving the way for its reopening. The township's license renewal in January 2026 enabled the builder to secure the OC, resolving pending paperwork and corrective measures. Residents can now anticipate the return of key amenities like the swimming pool.

news.title: Airport ready for flights, property rates go up in Greater Noida
news.para: Greater Noida Industrial Development Authority has increased property allotment rates by 3.5%, with commercial properties now at Rs 98,776 per sqm and residential plots at Rs 51,363 per sqm. This revision precedes the June 15 launch of commercial operations at the Noida International Airport, anticipating increased investor and buyer demand.

news.title: Expert committee on Aravalli must consult domain experts, other stakeholders: SC
news.para: The Supreme Court is forming an expert committee to define the Aravalli hills and ranges. This committee must consult with domain experts and the public. The court emphasized a manageable committee size, suggesting 5-7 members. This move follows concerns over a previous definition that might have excluded parts of the range from environmental protection.

news.title: Eldeco Housing's net profit rises 12.93% to ₹24.28 crore in FY26
news.para: Eldeco Housing & Industries reported a 12.93% rise in net consolidated profit for FY26, reaching ₹24.28 crore. Total income also saw a significant increase of 22.29% to ₹175.71 crore. The company's board recommended a 450% final dividend, and it secured land parcels valued at ₹2,000 crore GDV.

news.title: AU Real Estate plans to invest ₹1200 crore to develop residential project in Ghaziabad
news.para: AU Real Estate is set to invest ₹1200 crore in its new residential project, Cosmos Corner, located in Siddharth Vihar, Ghaziabad. The development, spread across 5.6 acres, will feature 831 units across 40 floors with a projected revenue of ₹1600 crore. Residences are priced from ₹6,900 per sq ft.

news.title: Awfis Space Solutions' net profit up 4.39% to ₹70.85 crore in FY26
news.para: Awfis Space Solutions reported a 4.39% rise in net profit for FY26, reaching ₹70.85 crore, with total income surging 25.81% to ₹1,586.12 crore. The company expanded significantly, adding 41 new centres and 30,000 seats. Fourth-quarter profits saw a remarkable 106.95% jump. This growth highlights Awfis's strong performance and expansion strategy.

news.title: HeidelbergCement India's profit falls over 10% to ₹45.21 crore in Q4 FY26
news.para: HeidelbergCement India reported a 10.38% year-on-year decline in net profit to Rs 45.21 crore for the March quarter of FY26, primarily due to lower sales realization. Despite a 5.5% increase in revenue driven by higher sales volume, a 2% decrease in prices impacted profitability. The company recommended a 70% dividend for FY26.

news.title: Surya Roshni's net profit dips 17.54% to ₹285.81 crore in FY26
news.para: Surya Roshni reported a 17.54% decline in net consolidated profit for FY26, reaching ₹285.81 crore, despite a 1.73% increase in total income to ₹7,594.39 crore. The company's managing director highlighted strong sales in March 2026 and a 7% revenue growth in lighting and consumer durables for FY26.

news.title: Shriram Properties' net profit up 30.41% to ₹100.81 crore in FY26
news.para: Shriram Properties witnessed a robust 30.41% surge in net profit for FY26, reaching ₹100.81 crore. Total income also climbed significantly by 39.40% to ₹1,356.93 crore. The company reported strong sales bookings of ₹2,354 crore and handed over 3,465 homes, while adding substantial new project pipelines.

news.title: Ajmera Realty's net profit up 18.93% to ₹149.79 crore in FY26
news.para: Ajmera Realty & Infra India reported a robust 18.93% rise in net profit for FY26, reaching ₹149.79 crore. Total income surged by 45.80% to ₹1,098 crore. The company highlighted a significant five-year growth trajectory and ambitious targets for FY27, driven by new projects and its Wadala land bank.

news.title: NBCC India's net profit rises 33.19% to ₹742.44 crore in FY26
news.para: NBCC (India) has announced a significant 33.19% surge in its net consolidated profit for FY26, reaching ₹742.44 crore. This growth was accompanied by a 7.52% increase in total income to ₹13,195.88 crore. The company's board also recommended a final dividend of ₹0.46 per share for FY26.

news.title: Kalpataru signs cluster redevelopment project in Kandivali East, Mumbai
news.para: Kalpataru has secured a significant cluster redevelopment project in Mumbai's Ashok Nagar, encompassing five societies across 2.8 acres. This venture boasts a substantial free sale potential of 0.37 million sq ft carpet area, with an estimated gross development value reaching ₹1,250 crore. The company also reported robust financial performance in Q4 FY26, with pre-sales and collections showing impressive year-on-year growth.

news.title: Puravankara acquires 14.57-acre land parcel in Mandur, Bengaluru
news.para: Puravankara has acquired a 14.57-acre land parcel in Bengaluru's Mandur, Budigere, with a potential gross development value of ₹2,300 crore. This acquisition, comprising both purchased land and a joint development agreement, will yield approximately 1.8 million sq ft of saleable area. The company's Bengaluru developable landbank now stands at 25.61 million sq ft.

news.title: No decision to dismantle LIFE Mission housing scheme: Kerala's LSG minister
news.para: Kerala's Local Self Government Minister K M Shaji has clarified that the UDF government has no plans to disband the LIFE Mission housing scheme. He stated that restoring powers to grama sabhas does not equate to scrapping the project, emphasizing that the new government aims to correct shortcomings rather than dismantle existing initiatives.
